query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name') FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND JSONExtractString(labels,'k8s.cluster.name')!='' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Total Certificates
panels.description: Total certificates tracked by cert-manager. Sum of ready_status across all condition values equals total cert count (exactly one condition = 1 per cert).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Ready Certificates
panels.description: Certificates currently in Ready condition (actively serving TLS).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'condition')='True') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Not Ready Certificates
panels.description: Certificates with condition=False. Non-zero indicates issuance or renewal failure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'condition')='False') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Webhook Requests In-Flight
panels.description: Current number of admission requests being processed by the cert-manager webhook.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_requests_in_flight' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_requests_in_flight' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Certificate Ready Status per Cert
panels.description: Ready condition value per certificate over time (1=ready, 0=not ready). Drops indicate issuance or renewal failures.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `name`, `namespace`, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS `name`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'namespace') AS `namespace`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'condition')='True') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `name`, `namespace`, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `name`, `namespace` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Not Ready Certificates by Namespace
panels.description: Count of not-ready certificates grouped by namespace. Growing values indicate systemic issuance problems.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `namespace`, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'namespace') AS `namespace`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'condition')='False') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_certificate_ready_status' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `namespace`, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `namespace` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Controller Sync Call Rate
panels.description: Rate of sync() calls per controller per second. Spikes may indicate high reconciliation load.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `controller`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `controller`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'controller') AS `controller`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_controller_sync_call_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_controller_sync_call_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `controller`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `controller` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Controller Sync Error Rate
panels.description: Rate of sync() errors per controller per second. Sustained errors indicate reconciliation problems.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `controller`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `controller`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'controller') AS `controller`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_controller_sync_error_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_controller_sync_error_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `controller`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `controller` ORDER BY time

panels.title: ACME Request Rate by Action
panels.description: Rate of outbound ACME HTTP requests per action (getNonce, createOrder, finalizeOrder, etc.).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `action`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `action`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'action') AS `action`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `action`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `action` ORDER BY time

panels.title: ACME Error Rate (non-2xx) by Action
panels.description: Rate of ACME requests returning non-2xx HTTP status codes per action. Persistent errors indicate ACME provider issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `action`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `action`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'action') AS `action`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_count' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'status') NOT LIKE '2%') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `action`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `action` ORDER BY time

panels.title: ACME Average Request Duration by Action
panels.description: Average ACME HTTP request duration per action. Computed from Summary .sum / .count rate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sa.time AS time, sa.`action` AS `action`, sa.x/nullIf(cb.x,0) AS value FROM (SELECT time, `action`, sum(r) AS x FROM (SELECT time, fp, `action`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'action') AS `action`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_duration_seconds.sum' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_duration_seconds.sum' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `action`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `action`) sa INNER JOIN (SELECT time, `action`, sum(r) AS x FROM (SELECT time, fp, `action`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'action') AS `action`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_duration_seconds.count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='certmanager_http_acme_client_request_duration_seconds.count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `action`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `action`) cb ON sa.time=cb.time AND sa.`action`=cb.`action` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Webhook Request Rate by Status Code
panels.description: Rate of admission webhook requests grouped by HTTP response status code.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `code`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `code`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'code') AS `code`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_requests_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_requests_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `code`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `code` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Webhook Average Admission Latency
panels.description: Average admission webhook processing latency computed from histogram .sum / .count rates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sa.time AS time, sa.x/nullIf(cb.x,0) AS value FROM (SELECT time, sum(r) AS x FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_latency_seconds.sum' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_latency_seconds.sum' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time) sa INNER JOIN (SELECT time, sum(r) AS x FROM (SELECT time, fp, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_latency_seconds.count' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='controller_runtime_webhook_latency_seconds.count' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time) cb ON sa.time=cb.time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Work Queue Depth by Controller
panels.description: Current item count in each controller work queue. Growing depth indicates processing backlog.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `name`, avg(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS `name`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='workqueue_depth' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='workqueue_depth' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `name`, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `name` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Work Queue Add Rate by Controller
panels.description: Rate of items enqueued per controller queue per second.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `name`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `name`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'name') AS `name`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='workqueue_adds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint) t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='workqueue_adds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `name`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `name` ORDER BY time

panels.title: CPU Usage by Component
panels.description: CPU core utilization rate per cert-manager component (controller, webhook, cainjector).

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `service.name`, sum(r) AS value FROM (SELECT time, fp, `service.name`, cluster, greatest(v - lagInFrame(v,1,v) OVER (PARTITION BY fp ORDER BY time), 0) / $__interval_s AS r FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'service.name') AS `service.name`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, max(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='process_cpu_seconds_total' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'service.name') LIKE 'cert-manager%') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='process_cpu_seconds_total' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `service.name`, cluster)) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `service.name` ORDER BY time

panels.title: Memory Usage by Component
panels.description: Resident set size (RSS) memory per cert-manager component in bytes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, `service.name`, sum(v) AS value FROM (SELECT toStartOfInterval(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000), INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, s.fingerprint AS fp, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'service.name') AS `service.name`, JSONExtractString(t.labels,'k8s.cluster.name') AS cluster, anyLast(s.value) AS v FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4 s INNER JOIN (SELECT fingerprint, any(labels) AS labels FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name='process_resident_memory_bytes' GROUP BY fingerprint HAVING JSONExtractString(labels,'service.name') LIKE 'cert-manager%') t ON s.fingerprint=t.fingerprint WHERE s.metric_name='process_resident_memory_bytes' AND $__timeFilter(toDateTime(s.unix_milli/1000)) GROUP BY time, fp, `service.name`, cluster) WHERE cluster IN (${cluster:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, `service.name` ORDER BY time
